## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to review content strategy and generation process for Relay's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has created initial artifacts (writing guidelines, audience persona, company context) for Relay's review by next Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Atlas platform walkthrough showcased the content generation pipeline, from ideation to SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on positioning Relay as the cash flow management banking platform, targeting SMBs with $750K+ revenue](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Compliance considerations may impact content velocity due to banking partner review requirements](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Artifacts and Process

  - [Three key artifacts created: writing guidelines, audience persona, company context](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Atlas platform showcases full content generation pipeline:](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [Ideation (assignments) → Assignment brief → Research → Outline → Draft → Fact-checking → Internal linking → SEO meta tags](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Automated processes with human oversight at critical stages (e.g., assignment brief, pre-draft review)](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Plagiarism concerns raised; Erik to follow up with more details on safeguards](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Goals: Position Relay as cash flow management banking platform, rank for high-intent queries, educate SMBs](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [KPIs: Increase from 14K to 17-18K weekly sessions within 6 months, rank top 3 for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Five topic clusters identified, including small business financial management, cash flow management, home services, business financial management, and accounting/bookkeeping](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Strategy to focus on top and middle funnel content initially](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

### Compliance and Review Process

  - [Relay's banking partner reviews all content, potentially slowing down publication](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Keywords like "bank" may trigger compliance review](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Team to strategize on efficient content approval process, possibly clustering content for review](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking

  - [Introduction to Scrunch tool for tracking LLM visibility and competitor presence in search results](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [Weekly screenshots to be shared showing progress as content is published](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Relay team to review and provide feedback on artifacts and content strategy by next Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct product deep dive tomorrow to inform content approach](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Keyword research to be completed early next week, with 40-50 high-level assignments for review](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Select batch of assignments and prioritize one for full workflow calibration](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Follow up on platform access for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Ada (managing editor) upon her return from vacation](https://fathom.video/share/GimenSE5VhJAWxLK2wtUsEMxsHEWF--_?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
